name: ActBlue / GoFundMe Charity
description: Online fundraising platforms designed for political campaigns and advocacy organisations. ActBlue is the US standard; in Australia, platforms like GoFundMe Charity, Chuffed, and direct Stripe integrations serve similar functions for political fundraising.
whyUseIt: Digital fundraising is now the primary source of small-dollar donations for political campaigns. These platforms handle payment processing, recurring donations, donor management, and compliance reporting — letting campaigns focus on asking rather than accounting.
aiCapabilities: Predictive optimal ask amounts, automated donor re-engagement, A/B testing for donation pages
funnelPosition: Bottom funnel — conversion from supporter to donor
marketerWorkflow: Create a donation page with compelling copy, embed in emails and social posts, track donations in real time, export data for AEC disclosure compliance
managerExpects: Daily fundraising totals, average donation size, number of new donors vs recurring, top fundraising email or post
demoDescription: Set up a donation page for a campaign launch, create a $25 recurring donation option, and build an automated thank-you email sequence that triggers on donation

vocabulary.definition: Donations under $100, typically from grassroots supporters via digital platforms
The donation amount above which donors must be publicly disclosed to the AEC ($16,300 in 2024-25)

beginnerMistakes: Not setting up recurring donation options — one-time donors are expensive to re-acquire
Failing to track donations against AEC disclosure thresholds
